summary: Iteration 44: War Room & Payment Orchestration Layer - All features verified. Backend: 11/11 tests pass. Frontend: All UI components verified working.

minor.issue: Church admin (Aivy) lacks admin.giving permission - only platform admin can configure processors
minor.note: This is by design - RBAC working correctly

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions (-1 width/height) - cosmetic only, charts render correctly

war_room.War Room page loads: PASS - data-testid=war-room with dark navy background
war_room.4 counter cards: PASS - Members (200), Kids Checked In (0), Cafe Orders (230), MTD Giving ($70,143)
war_room.Capacity gauges: PASS - data-testid=capacity-gauges shows Kids 0/40, Cafe 0/100, Giving 28%
war_room.Sidebar nav: PASS - data-testid=nav-war-room with green pulse dot

payment_orchestration.GET /api/giving/processors: PASS - Returns 6 processors (stripe, pushpay, tithe_ly, planning_center, subsplash, manual)
payment_orchestration.GET /api/admin/giving/processor-settings: PASS - Returns active_processor and processors config
payment_orchestration.POST /api/admin/giving/processor-setting: PASS - Connects pushpay and sets as active
payment_orchestration.POST /api/giving/process: PASS - Returns success with transaction_id and confirmation
payment_orchestration.6 processor cards: PASS - All 6 processors displayed with status indicators
payment_orchestration.Connect buttons: PASS - Connect buttons work (requires admin.giving permission)

critical_code_review_comments: WarRoom.jsx correctly implements all required components with proper data-testid attributes
IntegrationsPage.jsx properly displays 6 payment processors with connect/disconnect functionality
Backend /api/admin/war-room endpoint returns comprehensive real-time data
Backend /api/giving/process endpoint properly routes through active processor and records donations
RBAC working correctly - admin.giving permission required for processor configuration

success_rate.frontend: 100% (War Room and Payment Orchestration UI verified)

seed_data_creation: Created test donation via /api/giving/process during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 44 verified War Room (dark navy command center with live counters, activity feed, capacity gauges, quick actions) and Payment Orchestration Layer (6 mocked processors, unified /api/giving/process endpoint). Note: admin.giving permission required for processor configuration - use platform admin (admin@solomon.ai). DemoWalkthrough modal appears on first visit - dismiss with 'I'll figure it out myself' button. Rate limiting: 5 logins/min per IP.

mocked_apis_list: All 6 payment processors (Stripe, Pushpay, Tithe.ly, Planning Center, Subsplash, Manual) - return realistic fake responses
Twilio SMS notifications - logged to console
